national_indicator_available: Prevalence rate of physical, psychological and sexual violence
comparison_sdg: The time series are compliant with the UN metadata.
indicator_name: Proportion of population subjected to (a) physical violence, (b) psychological violence and/or (c) sexual violence in the previous 12 months
target_name: Significantly reduce all forms of violence and related death rates everywhere
un_designated_tier_url_alert: der Statistischen Division der Vereinten Nationen
un_custodian_agency: United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC)
goal_meta_link_alert: the Statistical Devision of the UN
source_organisation_1: Bundeskriminalamt
source_url_text_1: Dark field research / Victimization Surveys (only available in German)
source_url_text_1c: Security and crime in Germany – SKiD 2020 (only available in German)
data_footnotes:
Prevalence rate: Proportion of persons living in Germany aged 16 and over who have been victimised once or more in a given period.
• Physical violence: Due to methodological changes, the results from 2020 onwards are only comparable with previous years to a limited extend. For further information, see ‘1. General information on the time series’ in the national metadata.
• Psychological violence and for sexual violence: Data is only available from 2020.
goal_meta_national_link_text: Metadata on the presented time series
